message:
test(glowing_text): add 42 unit tests + wire orphan module into lib.rs (bd-3vkle)

Wire glowing_text.rs into lib.rs under the text-effects feature gate (was
orphaned/uncompiled). Fix Widget::render signature (self -> &self) to match
trait. Add comprehensive tests covering color utilities, GlowingText builder
and rendering, TransitionOverlay (opacity bell curve, glow intensity,
visibility), and TransitionState lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
